CE1.justification: Acted directly with no clarifying questions; agent-side reads of AGENTS.md and observations.md imposed no load on the user.

CE2.justification: Compact overall, but the reply tacks on an unrequested epistemic hedge about credentials-lag attribution and a suggestion to check against onboarding blockers — one stretch of unneeded prose beyond the ask.

CE3.justification: Names the destination (observations.md) but the routing rationale (hypothesis-framing, hedge) sits in the file body rather than as a short in-band why-clause.

CE4.justification: Single append to observations.md; an interruption would leave a coherent register state with no orphans.
